channel.title: Notes on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Home

item.title: Notes on reading halloy source code
item.description:
Intro

Hey, how’s it going ? Hope you’re doing well.

From some days, i have been trying out iced direct from create and soruce code but whenever i write it i feel i am not writing rust in a idomatic way. So i thought to read a open source codebase to understand a popular project on how to write a system from start to end, find design decisions, why something is written in someway and how can i learn from it and write my own applications end to end.
